hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -Eq '(^|[[:space:]])rm[[:space:]]+-[a-zA-Z]*r[a-zA-Z]*f?[[:space:]]+(/|/\*|~|\$HOME)([[:space:]]|$)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: destructive rm against root or home' >&2; exit 2; fi; if echo "$cmd" | grep -Eq 'git[[:space:]]+push.*(--force|(^|[[:space:]])-f([[:space:]]|$))' && echo "$cmd" | grep -Eq '(^|[[:space:]])(main|master)([[:space:]]|:|$)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: force push to main/master' >&2; exit 2; fi; if echo "$cmd" | grep -Eq 'git[[:space:]]+reset[[:space:]]+--hard'; then branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); case "$branch" in main|master|release/*) echo "BLOCKED: git reset --hard on protected branch '$branch'" >&2; exit 2 ;; esac; fi; exit 0
